first_run.rationale: The evaluation remains fundamentally unchanged. Both versions award the same score (3/10) and provide the same core justification: the candidate is a strong individual contributor but lacks the executive leadership and team-scaling experience required for the CTO role. The minor variations in wording and the specific company names mentioned in the strengths/concerns are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not alter the substance of the assessment. The model's conclusion is stable and not influenced by the change in employer names.
